time_events.label: Dawn Pigeons
time_events.wrong_phase_message: Just bricks now. Come back at dawn.

time_events.label: Trash Pickup
time_events.success_message: Truck rumbles past. A dollar blows your way.
time_events.wrong_phase_message: Quiet curb. Trucks come in the morning.

time_events.label: Sun On Brick
time_events.success_message: Light hits the wall. You find change in a crack.
time_events.wrong_phase_message: Shadows are wrong. Wait for afternoon.

time_events.label: Block Smoke
time_events.success_message: Someone left a pack on the stoop.
time_events.wrong_phase_message: Air is still. Evening brings the smokers.

time_events.label: Distant Siren
time_events.success_message: Siren fades. You feel watched, then alone.
time_events.wrong_phase_message: Too quiet. Sirens find this place late.
